title: Carpet Ice Addition
description: A Carpet extension mod with practical tweaks and fixes.
body:
# Carpet Ice Addition

Carpet Ice Addition is a lightweight extension for [Carpet](https://modrinth.com/mod/carpet), adding practical and configurable Carpet-style rules for technical survival servers and vanilla-friendly gameplay.

Under the default configuration, this mod does **not** change vanilla behavior. All features need to be enabled manually through Carpet rules.

## What does it add?

This mod focuses on small, targeted rules that help reduce accidental player mistakes, improve technical-server reliability, and handle edge cases around machines, fake players, mobs, and vanilla mechanics.

Documentation:

- [Rules](https://github.com/Ice2974/Carpet-Ice-Addition/blob/main/docs/rules_en.md)
- [Commands](https://github.com/Ice2974/Carpet-Ice-Addition/blob/main/docs/commands_en.md)
- [Loggers](https://github.com/Ice2974/Carpet-Ice-Addition/blob/main/docs/loggers_en.md)

## Why use it?

Carpet Ice Addition is intended for servers that want small, independent Carpet rules without installing a large gameplay overhaul. It is especially useful for technical survival servers where accidental block breaking, item overflow, fake-player interactions, and mob-related edge cases can affect machines or gameplay reliability.

Each rule is independent, so server owners can enable only the features they need.

## Notes

- This is a Carpet extension and should be used with a matching version of Carpet and Fabric API as listed in the version dependencies.
